title: Ubeac
description: IoT platform for unified building automation and control systems.
content:
## Overview

Ubeac provides IoT solutions for smart building management and automation.

## Challenge

They needed a scalable platform to connect and manage various IoT devices across multiple buildings.

## Solution

We developed a cloud-based IoT platform with real-time device monitoring, automation rules, and comprehensive analytics.

## Results

- Connected 50,000+ IoT devices
- 30% energy savings for clients
- Real-time monitoring and alerts
